---
title: "**Aanish Pradhan**"
subtitle: "Computational and Data Science Student"
description: "*\"The greater our knowledge increases, the greater our ignorance unfolds.\" - John F. Kennedy*"
title-block-banner: ../assets/Figures/Home-Page/banner.jpg
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

```{r Packages, echo = FALSE}
# IMPORT PACKAGES
library(leaflet)
```


Hi there and welcome to my personal website!

# About Me

Currently, I'm a graduate student at Virginia Tech working towards my master's 
degree in computer science. I completed my bachelor's in Computational Modeling 
and Data Analytics (bulky phrase for applied math, computer science and 
statistics, I know...) from Virginia Tech.  

Broadly, my research interests lie at the intersection of numerical linear 
algebra, high-performance computing and machine learning. I also have interests 
in data visualization, explainable artificial intelligence and pedagogy.

# Contact

The best way to contact me is by sending me a message on my 
[LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/aanishpradhan).
